title: Net-New Story Gap Review — 2026-05-15 (HRREC-82977)
content:
Stories (continued 43–44 of 44)

Story Gap score (%) PM lens QA lens XO lens Verdict Suggested missing BDD (Given/When/Then)

HRREC-92035
PH: Email communications are visible in Activity Stream, Timeline and Candidate Communications

34% — agency matrix called out
  • Jira — agency matrix — align with security domains and tab visibility siblings.; attachments — align client vs server size/type rejection.
  • Salomon — (Replay placeholder—not live Salomon excerpts.) Run Salomon on this ticket’s exact wording in a live review; this replay only mirrors summary/gap keywords—not real hits.
  • Deployment Agent — (Replay placeholder—not live Deployment Agent answers.) In a live review, ask DA which admin toggles mirror common customer misconfiguration for this area.
  • Jira — Add one negative path tied to this summary.
  • Salomon — (Replay placeholder—not live Salomon excerpts.) In a live run, search Salomon on this key’s words—not a generic inbox checklist.

XO MCP — (Replay placeholder—condensed from stub XO text.) Same catalog snapshot as the row above (one epic-wide search in this replay). For HRREC-92035, reconcile agency vs direct predicates with Conversation Message / Recruiting Email bindings this slice assumes. Risk — Same catalog-level risk as rows above—confirm wiring for this key.
  • Finding: No strong cross-lens conflict showed up in this heuristic replay.
  • Recommended next step: Re-read Jira for “Recording events in the Job Application...” on HRREC-92035; if nothing new surfaces, keep scenarios as written.

Beyond Jira — Recording events in the Job Application Activity Stream
Given A recruiter with Modify/Send on conversational email where this slice applies on a tenant staged for this epic; Jira’s first *Given* already includes: a 2-way email conversation occurs in the conte...
When I move between agency vs non-agency tabs or entry points this story owns while the candidate matches both contexts in QA
Then Observable UI, notification, or persisted thread state matches the acceptance criteria for this slice in recruiter-verifiable terms (harden wording under 430 / 319 before sign-off)

Agency vs non-agency predicates
Given the candidate has agency-linked and direct applications (or agency association toggles) as exercised in QA staging
When I open the email task and any tabs or compose entry points this story owns
Then chrome and permissions follow the portfolio rules for each case without thread bleed or misleading empty tabs

HRREC-92036
PH: Send Message (With Attachments)

33% — agency matrix called out
  • Jira — Make sure what happens on the server matches what recruiters see in the app for this story (errors, limits, and send behaviour).
  • Salomon — (Replay placeholder—not live Salomon excerpts.) If internal threads mention attachment limits, align on-screen hints with what the system rejects for this slice.
  • Deployment Agent — (Replay placeholder—not live Deployment Agent answers.) In a live review, ask DA how to stage send paths with slow networks and mid-flight cancels.
  • Jira — Test attachment boundary errors this story owns.
  • Salomon — (Replay placeholder—not live Salomon excerpts.) In a live run, search Salomon on this key’s words—not a generic inbox checklist.

XO MCP — (Replay placeholder—condensed from stub XO text.) Same catalog snapshot as the row above (one epic-wide search in this replay). For HRREC-92036, reconcile agency vs direct predicates with Conversation Message / Recruiting Email bindings this slice assumes. Risk — Same catalog-level risk as rows above—confirm wiring for this key.
  • Finding: No strong cross-lens conflict showed up in this heuristic replay.
  • Recommended next step: Re-read Jira for “Happy path send with attachments (Bloba...” on HRREC-92036; if nothing new surfaces, keep scenarios as written.

Beyond Jira — Happy path send with attachments (Blobatory Reference)
Given A recruiter with Modify/Send on conversational email where this slice applies on a tenant staged for this epic; Jira’s first *Given* already includes: I have a valid composed email state that inclu...
When I add, remove, or send with attachments at the boundary of the stated size/type rules for this ticket
Then Client and server outcomes match recruiter-visible error copy and thread contents at the stated attachment limits

Agency vs non-agency predicates
Given the candidate has agency-linked and direct applications (or agency association toggles) as exercised in QA staging
When I open the email task and any tabs or compose entry points this story owns
Then chrome and permissions follow the portfolio rules for each case without thread bleed or misleading empty tabs

Attachment limits client and server
Given I stage allowed and disallowed files and sizes around the published limit
When I attempt send
Then client validation, server rejection, and recruiter-visible error strings stay aligned (no orphan partial sends)

How this table was produced (for operators)

This run: 44 stories in this table under HRREC-82977 (AG: / RN: doc-writer tickets excluded per user-story-gap-review skill). Jira: bulk REST ingest (gap_review_82977_jira_bulk_session.json — descriptions parsed to plain text for gap heuristics). Replay note: This HTML is generated from frozen evidence JSON (formatter only); live /user-story-gap-review runs use fresh MCP evidence per the skill. Scenario hooks: scenario_count, first_scenario_title, first_given_line from build_gap_evidence_session.py. Initiative vocabulary: docs/initiatives/two-way-email/STORY_WRITING_SUPPLEMENT.md.

Compact table for Confluence publish (MCP timeout). Full prose version: docs/initiatives/two-way-email/drafts/gap_review_82977_confluence_body.html in repo.

Canonical path: docs/initiatives/two-way-email/drafts/GAP_REVIEW_PUBLISH.md; replay flags: gap_review_82977_evidence_META.json.
